judge_result.short_rationale: Includes fresh air, but misses the required immediate actions to help breathing if needed and to call a doctor/poison control immediately. It weakens escalation by making the call conditional on breathing difficulty or persistent symptoms, and adds unsupported ingestion-related advice for an inhalation incident.
